input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for fix1512.
input_context.default_vote_question: Infer the latest stable release source default vote from the source-backed amendment description only.

source_facts.claim: fix1512: Fixes a bug in transaction processing that causes some invalid PaymentChannelClaim transactions to fail with the wrong error code. Without this amendment, the transactions have a tec-class result code despite not being included in a ledger. With this amendment, the transactions fail with a more appropriate result code, temBAD_AMOUNT, instead.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
fix1512 appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 0.80.0.
